positive: A mystical, symmetrical forest scene featuring bioluminescent flora and fauna. The central element is a graceful stag silhouetted against a glowing moonlit forest canopy. Use a vibrant, ethereal color palette dominated by deep blues, electric teals, and glowing viridian greens. The composition must be highly stylized and graphic, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Focus on strong contrast between the deep shadows and the glowing light sources. Include abstract, mandala-like patterns incorporated into the leaf structures and background elements. Clean lines, detailed flora, perfect symmetry, highly detailed vector illustration style, concept art, art nouveau influence. Full body stag, centered, looking upwards.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifact, watermark, text, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, cartoonish, abstract background only, copyright, trademark, messy, cluttered, photorealism
